hotel_name: Khách sạn Golden Beach Nha Trang (Khach san Golden Beach Nha Trang)

reviews.title: nightmare on Elm street
reviews.text: the place is room for rent by the hours (you know what i meant) mold, cracks around walls, fixture are lose hanging from the wall (nightlight) it's was BIG MISTAKES to stay here for 1 night (got scared woke up 4-5 a.m ... walked around just to kill times till i can get to my original booked Hotel on front beach.

reviews.title: Old hotel, seriously deteriorated. Dirty.
reviews.text:
I am really disappointed with the quality of the room here.

Pros: central location, cheap price, close to the beach, friendly staff.

Cons:
Oh my God, it's old, it has seriously deteriorated, it's such a letdown. I looked at reviews on Agoda and Google Maps and they seemed fine, but when I arrived, I was shocked 😭. It's old and ugly, it has mold, it’s dirty.
There’s no shampoo or shower gel, no ironing board, the furniture is totally worn out. The elevator isn't cleaned, and neither is the hallway. There are no words to describe it.
The towels are just old, like one cleaning cloth. The bedding is not really bedding, just a piece of cloth to cover up with, not an actual blanket at all 🥲.
The air conditioning unit placed outside the window is incredibly dirty, disgusting, it makes you want to throw up.
The room is not soundproof, so you can hear everything going on outside, and if the other rooms slam their doors, you can hear that too. I couldn't sleep at all.
Oh my God, I booked a really terrible hotel.

reviews.title: Excellent rapport qualité/prix/emplacement

reviews.negatives: Piscine un peu sale et eau froide liée à l'ancienneté du bâtiment, mais ça ne nous a pas dérangés

reviews.title: Several things broken, very loud at night
reviews.text:
In our room the window handle was missing and so the window wouldn’t close, but it was looking out onto a busy street below. We couldn’t sleep due to people shouting and screaming, car horns blaring at all hours and people revving their motorbikes loudly at 4am. The staff told us that it would be fixed the following day but this didn’t happen. 

The toilet seat and light switch next to the bed were also broken. There were patches of mould on the walls and some of the skirting boards were flaking off. The towels had some stains on them. 

The WiFi was unreliable. Washing up is left in the sinks in the downstairs bathroom from the staff’s mealtimes. 

One staff member was neither friendly nor helpful though the others were pleasant. 

It is close to the beach and a lot of very nice cafes and restaurants.

reviews.title: The environment is too noisy in the evening.
reviews.text: The front desk was very good and willing to help. Although the hotel is older, it was relatively clean and the rooms were spacious, and the price was not high. However! However! It was too noisy at night, with extremely loud music and singing, as well as motorcycles, around the area that sounded like ghosts crying and wolves howling, it was very, very noisy. Then, when I checked the hotel's check-out time, I found that the price had dropped.

reviews.title: Older style hotel but good value
reviews.text: This is an older style hotel, the location is on the Main Street and a short walk to the beach. Value is very good as the off-season price we paid through Agoda was excellent. The restaurant is closed but many places to eat in this area.
reviews.room_type: Double or Twin Room Pool Level

reviews.title: Worst service
reviews.negatives:
Tôi trả phòng và có quên 1 bộ sạc điện thoại hiệu Samsung. Sau đó liên hệ lại khách sạn thì được báo rằng đã kiểm tra làm phòng nhưng lại không có gì. Tôi chắc chắn đã để lại. Tuy không đáng nhiều tiền nhưng tôi đang hỏi liệu nó đã đi đâu và ai đã lấy? Thật tệ. Không khuyến khích đến khách sạn này.
I checked out yesterday and left a black Samsung charger.
I called back and received a reply that they did not find anything in my room. I left it on the bed table for sure. It was not expensive but I wonder where it has gone? I do not recommend it.

reviews.title: Great clean room in heart of the city
reviews.text: Location perfect. I was only there for one night but room was great. Enough space and bonus with chairs, table, kettle and toiletries. Shower was good. Bed is hard but I don’t mind that. Close enough to the beach that I swam and walked back in my togs. And walk outside and you’re surrounded with restaurants, spas, and bars etc. Staff not outgoing friendly but aren’t rude. Expected given it’s more of a hotel than Homestay vibe. Would happily stay here again.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Golden beach mảnh đất anh hùng                                                          2 mũ bảo hiểm mất cùng 1 đêm.  Nhân viên thì bảo do khách thuê xe mượn lấy đi đỡ :) tối nay mũ sẽ tự quay trở về nhưng 7749 năm nữa chưa thấy quay về

reviews.title: Really nice staff. Glad I stayed.
reviews.text:
The staff were so nice it made my stay a very good one. It's an older hotel, but everything works fine. The hot water is exceptional. The air conditioner works really well. The electrical outlets were in good  locations. It's a good place to stay if you're looking to save money. There is also a crepe stand in front. Very tasty. You can have your laundry done right there.
The first room offered was not to my satisfaction, but they offered me another in good spirits and it was good. If you like a real firm mattress, this is for you.
I came away satisfied with my time here.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Chị quản lý hỗ trợ kịp thời.
reviews.negatives: Khách sạn dơ lắm. Khăn có mùi hôi. Nội thất ọp ẹp lắm.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: I took an additional two days off on the 12th and 13th of November. I find it convenient here, and the rented motorcycle for outings is also very good. However, having a cup to drink water would be more convenient.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Nếu xác định cần một chỗ nghĩ hợp lý với giá tiền thì câu trả lời ở đây là không hề hợp lý.giá gần 300k/ đêm phòng 2 người thì còn thua những nơi khác giá dưới 200k. Nội thất cũ kỹ xuống cấp.sàn bong tróc.toilet có dấu hiệu nghẹt.tủ nội thất muốn rớt cánh cửa.hồ bơi chỉ để trưng bày không hoạt động.chỉ có mỗi 2 bạn nhân viên lễ tân là ok vui vẻ nhiệt tình. Xe máy ở đây cho thuê thì cực kỳ cũ nát . Không xứng đáng hình ảnh 3*. không có nổi một cái tủ lạnh mini. Máy lạnh từ thời napoleon. hình ảnh trên app chắc được chụp cách đây hơn chục năm.tóm lại lời khuyên chân thành là không nên chọn chỗ này

reviews.title: Stable prices for prime locations
reviews.text: Affordable price compared to the current location of the hotel. Surrounding area has all necessary amenities.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Vị trí khách sạn tốt , trung tâm, nhưng kế bên quán bar/pub/karaoke nên rất ồn đêm không ngủ được. 
Khách sạn vệ sinh rất kém, khe kẽ dơ, thang máy bụi bẩn dơ, tường bong tróc, tủ áo không có móc áo, minibar trống trơn, thảm dơ, khu vực hồ bơi càng dơ hơn, nhân viên không lau dọn, đáy hồ bơi đầy bụi bẩn, vợt lưới thì văng vứt trên tầng hồ bơi, nhìn chung rất messy. Phòng decor thì ok ổn với 1 ks 3 sao như vậy nhưng chưa vệ sinh sạch , ko có chai nước và máy lạnh thì cũ lắm rồi không lạnh cho lắm, đồ bấm máy lạnh cũng hư ko điều khiển được, chìa khóa phòng vặn cửa cũng khó khăn. Nhân viên khách sạn thì ít và phục vụ cũng kém luôn. Tiếc cho 1 khách sạn 3 sao nhưng khâu bảo trì bão dưỡng và chất lượng phục vụ quá tệ và giá 500k/1 đêm như vầy là cao so với các khách sạn khác cùng phân khúc, cần phải cải thiện và sơn sửa rennovate, vệ sinh thật kỹ chăm chút lại từng chi tiết

Don't know about other rooms but mine was good, makes me extending 2 more nights..even if it was more expensive than first two nights (150k more!)
They bothers around 11 am for cleaning room, but at least you can have the 2 free bottles of water:))

reviews.title: Superb location
reviews.text: Good location for Muslim guests because halal restaurant is just across the road. There is also halal Uzbekistan restaurant about 20m away from hotel. Generally there are many eateries around the hotel so you are spoilt for choices. Reception allowed me to check in at noon so that is a plus point thank you. For sea lovers the beach is just about 10mins walk from hotel also hotel provides a good pickup location for private tours.

reviews.title: Very pleased!
reviews.text:
My room (302) was great by Vietam budget standards. Large windows with lots of natural light. Minifridge and kettle. Rock hard bed, which I'm okay with.
Typical minor issues (stained sheets, some lights didn't work, toilet leaked, aged furniture, dirty walls, etc.) but good enough for the price. No mold. Good hot water in the shower. Chairs in room had no cushions, but tolerable with sitting on a pillow.
Maid service every day (not at 8am as some reviewers said, it was usually between 1-3pm).
Often had to wait for the elevator, sometimes faster to take the stairs.
No noise issues at all, even on the 3rd floor facing the street. There's no loud clubs on the street anymore, and I never heard karaoke. 
Receptionist was extremely friendly and accommodating - exceptional by Vietnamese standards. No English spoken. 
They kindly allowed early check-in.
I liked it so much I extended for an additional week.
NOTE: I booked the "Deluxe" and got a street-facing room. Most of the other rooms only have tiny side windows, but I think they're still "Deluxe". So my experience would have been much worse if I was in one of those darker rooms.

I stayed here for 3 nights and my review is: reasonable prices, clean, staff is quite okay. I'm very satisfied. I give a score of 10 for quality!

reviews.title: Chúng tôi rất hài lòng
reviews.positives: Khách sạn rất chất lượng, phòng đẹp, sạch sẽ, nhân viên rất thân thiện. Bé nhà mình rất thích .

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very good, clean and hygienic, well-equipped, great service!!!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nhân viên hỗ trợ rất nhiệt tình, rất dễ chịu khi ở đây

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Very satisfied with the service attitude, the accommodation is clean.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives:
- Khách sạn vị trí tuyệt đẹp.
- Giá quá rẻ.
- Nhân viên quá nhiệt tình luôn.
Kỳ sau ra Nha Trang mình sẽ ở khách sạn này tiếp.

reviews.title: Everything is excellent from the location, staff, cleanliness, to the rooms. There's nothing to criticize.
reviews.text:
- Location: central West Street, 7 minutes walk to the beach
- Staff: super super cute
- Cleanliness: tidy, cleaning all day upon request!
- Extra cheap laundry service available, there is a self-service laundry across from the hotel for anyone in need
- Safe and everything is wonderful;
Compared to the price and quality, it's a fantastic deal
I will definitely come back many times and share with friends. At first, I found the price cheap and was afraid it would be dirty and not clean, so I only booked for one night. But when I arrived and checked in, I immediately booked 4 more nights.
Such a great deal

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Mình đã có trải nghiệm cực kỳ tốt tại đây. Khách sạn gần biển, ngay khu phố tây gần chợ đêm. Nhân viên phục vụ rất nhiệt tình, phòng sạch sẽ. Lần sau sẽ quay lại tiếp.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Golden Beach is my second home.

reviews.title: Exceptional

Tới nơi lễ tân nói mình lên coi phòng trước nếu ưng mới nhận phòng. 
Không ngờ chỉ 200k mà đầy đủ tiện nghi. Phòng lát sàn gỗ  ks còn có hồ bơi free. Lại ở khu phố tây
Nói chung rất ok nhé mn

reviews.title: Sympa
reviews.text: Sympa, bien acceuilli malgré que les numéros de hotel ne correspondait pas.  De grandes serviettes et des verres seraient bien venus ! Un peu bruyant .

reviews.title: Rapport qualité, prix parfait
reviews.text:
Nous avons séjourné avec ma femme pendant deux nuits dans cet établissement, idéalement situé en plein cœur de Nha Trang.
Au regard du tarif, nous avons été vraiment très satisfaits. Nous avons très bien dormi durant ces deux nuits.
Pour les petits budgets, c’est un choix idéal.

reviews.title: Ужасно!
reviews.positives: Было все ужасно!
reviews.negatives: Очень грязно,шумно и пыльно,персонал на входе в холле занимается своими делами,есть пьет,кричят,чешут волосы.Шум от дискотеки каждый день,внутри отеля шум от хозяев,кровати и стулья неудобные .Постельное белье грязное с волосами.Тараканы в номере.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Der Pool konnte nicht genutzt werden, da kein Wasser drin.
Alles verkommen auf der dachterasse.
Zimmer ok vom Preis leistungsverhältnis, Licht im bad ging nicht.

reviews.title: Stay away
reviews.positives: Расположение в центре,хорошая прачечная внизу
reviews.negatives: Отвратительно грязно!Отзывы куплены!Уборщицы убирают втроем но толку никакого нет,комки пыли трехтысячилетней давности!Под окнами стройка и дискотека,ужасно шумно!Занавеска  на окне не спасает от утренннго яркого солнца,большие и маленькие тараканы.Неудобные матрасы.Бежали сверкая пятками.

reviews.title: Bed Bugs
reviews.text: BEDBUGS!
reviews.room_type: Double or Twin Room Pool Level

reviews.title: Плесень, грибок, грязь.
reviews.positives: Местоположение
reviews.negatives: На стенах номера была плесень, это чувствовалось даже при дыхании, я моментально начал чихать. Номер старый, кондиционер давно не чистили. Холодильник старый. Полотенца серые от старости. Персонал на ресепшн занимается чем угодно, но не своей работой (готовят кушать, выдергивают седые волосы друг другу и в целом не обращают внимания на клиентов). Этот отель до ковида принимал туристов оператора, затем в 2019 году в одном из номеров кто-то умер и отель долгое время был закрыт. Я сразу же хотел покинуть этот отель, но был настолько уставшим, что переночевал одну ночь, надев маску чтобы меньше дышать плесенью. Утром я уехал, не оставшись на вторую ночь.

reviews.title: Super
reviews.text: Bardzo mi się podoba.Wszystko ok.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Очень грязно. Как в самом номере, так и во всем отеле. В холлах и лифте валяются окурки.
Постельное белье было несвежее. Полотенца были дырявые.
Шторы очень тонкие, так что с раннего утра в номере светло.
Ужасный интернет. Постоянные обрывы связи.
За 8 дней моего проживания 2 раза отключали воду на полдня.

reviews.title: Sehr schönes Zimmer
reviews.text:
Wir hatten ein sehr schönes Zimmer im 12. Stockwerk. Der Blick über die Stadt war großartig. 
Die Geräusche von der Straße hört man aber bis in die oberste Etage.
Es gibt 2 und 3 er Zimmer. Wir haben das größere 3 Zimmer genommen, weil es hier 2 Betten gibt. Das war eine gute Entscheidung, weil die 3er Zimmer größer sind.
Wasserflaschen gab es nur einmal.
Oben gibt es einen kleinen Pool. Das Wasser ist sonnenwarm. 
Gerne wären wir länger geblieben.
reviews.room_type: Triple Room - 1 Double Bed and 1 Single Bed

reviews.title: Гавно отель 😅 даже за такие деньги он того не стоит.вокруг много отелей по +- такой же цене, где будет хотя бы чисто
reviews.positives: Расположение нормальное
reviews.negatives:
Бассейн - не бассейн, а лужа где скот воду пьет. Зеленый, зацветет вот вот. Воняет, вокруг срач, за 3 дня ни разу не убрали! Хотя я пару раз за день подходила и спрашивала когда бассейн будет нормальный и чистый, когда там уберутся хотя бы. 
Номера грязные, уборка для галочки. Полотенца на столько застираны, в дырках, Позорные прям. 
На ресепшене парень то курит то спит, никакого желания тебе помочь у них нет.

reviews.title: Perfekt
reviews.text: Preis Leistung Verhältnis ist unschlagbar. Wir haben gleich verlängert. Fußläufig zum Meer und sehr zentral gelegen. Personal ist sehr freundlich.

reviews.title: Отел надо реконструировать и решать проблему с шумоизоляцией
reviews.positives: Мы жили 9 этаж - 902 номер. 2 кровати- 1 большая,1 односпальная. Номер большой с балкончиком и кондиционером. Есть российский канал поTV. Уборка каждый день. Смена постельного белья, полотенец и туалетных принадлежностей. Персонал улыбчивый и доброжелательный.
reviews.negatives: Матрасы жесткие, привыкаешь, но шум, крики, громкая музыка до 5 утра. Ночь превращается в кошмар и портит проживание в отеле. Цена не соответствует.

reviews.title: Top Lage
reviews.text: Nice staff, very good location

reviews.title: Рекомендую, если совсем больше некуда идти, из за локации и персонала.
reviews.positives: Персонал. Ресепшен, уборщицы. Дружелюбно, идут навстречу.
reviews.negatives: Отель морально и физически устарел. Его требуется закрыть и поэтапно восстанавливать. Слив унитаза работают через раз, от чайника жестко пахнет пластмасой и ему лет 20. Торшер разбит, на стенах плесень и осыпается штукатурка. Бассейн понятно не работает много лет.

reviews.title: Decent value for a short stay, but the property shows its age.
reviews.text: It's a reasonable place to stay for a night at a budget-friendly price. You get exactly what you pay for. The cleanliness itself is fine, but the facilities are a bit older and showing their age, which can give a less pristine impression. If you prefer a modern and spotless accommodation, you might want to consider other options.

reviews.title: Nhân viên tệ
reviews.text: Khoảng 9h ngày hôm sau tôi đặt thêm một đêm và không yêu cầu dọn phòng. Một giờ sau kho thanh toán, tôi xin nâng cấp phòng to hơn với 2 giường.  Nhân viên khẳng định đặt thêm phòng thì được, nâng cấp chuyển đổi dù trả thêm để nâng cấp cũng không…. Tôi bỏ cả phòng vừa thanh toán và ra khỏi….nhân viên nữ đó quá tệ

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Gia đình mình đi ngay dịp tết 2026, và trãi nghiệm rất tệ khi nhận được phòng, hình ảnh trên app là những gì có thể chấp nhận được khi book phòng thực tế thì mọi thứ gần như hư, kể cả nhà vệ sinh cũng hư, nước yếu, giường xếp kê tạm, vệ sinh kém, muỗi rất nhiều,... ôi thôi 1 trãi nghiệm rất rất tệ, chìa khóa phòng kẹt không mở được nhờ lên mở thì từ sáng đến chiều vẫn chưa ai mở, nhân viên gọi dạ thưa nhưng để đó chờ chứ không làm. Quá kinh khủng cho phòng hơn 3tr /đêm.

reviews.title: Ужасно грязно
reviews.text: Увидев как грязно на ресепшене к сожалению стало понятно куда мы приехали. Но в этот день все отели были битком и уйти не проучилось. Грязный ресепшен с тонной пыли, грязный заплеванный лифт. В номере валялись чужие волосы в огромном количестве, стол в какой то грязи. Запах сырости, канализации и сигарет. Я еще никогда не чувствовала такого отвращения. Грязные окна, тонкие полотенца которые не впитывают. Постельное белье грязно серого цвета, хорошо если стираное, уже небыло уверенности. Это был худший номер и отель в моей жизни за ***$

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Дешевый отель. Ничего не ожидал. Но есть нюансы, сейфа нет, уборку проводят только по выезду у нас за 3 дня ни разу не убрались, очень шумно от улицы. Плохо смывал унитаз, пришлось прочищать его самому. На ресепшене сидит парень, такое ощущение он вообще ни за что не отвечает и ничего не знает. Зато дёшево.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: В целом просто хороший отель

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Расположен в центре Нячанга. В отеле всё старое, давно не было ремонта, но в номере есть всё необходимое, постельное бельё и полотенца чистые, в номере порядок. И на мой взгляд дёшево за сутки за 3 местный номер отдал 302000 донгов (970 руб.)
reviews.room_type: Triple Room - 1 Double Bed and 1 Single Bed

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Чистота. Центр города. Отличный отель для пар

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Расположение удобное ( центр города). До моря тоже не далеко.Приятные люди на ресепшене. На короткий срок отличное решение.

reviews.title: Идеальный номер в свою цену
reviews.text: Мы сняли комнату за 574 рублей в сутки. Номер не первой свежести, но есть всё необходимое: 2 кровати, 2 стула, столик, прикроватный столик, обычной стол и зеркало, ТВ, холодильник, Шкаф, кондиционер, светильник, туалет, душ, зеркало, сушилка. А также наборы гигиенические. Есть клининг

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Очень хороший отель нам все понравилось, на верху есть бассейн но вы не будите там купаться поверьте мне. Не скажу что фу но зато есть лежаки можно выйти полежать и загорать, а так до море минут 5 пешком.
reviews.room_type: Double or Twin Room Pool Level

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Normal hotel. Clean and tidy. Suitable for a short stay.

reviews.title: City center
reviews.text:
Close to all restaurants and cafe, bars. Perfect location. Nice and clean room. Offer clean room everyday, thank you. 
P. S. Behind hotel is club with music, maybe not suit for family trip.

reviews.title: хороший отель
reviews.text: хороший отель за свои деньги, на рецепшене 24ч есть люди, всегда готовы помочь и подсказать

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great hotel for your money! I recommend to all both short and long term

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: У отеля очень хорошее месторасположение . Ранний заезд без проблем. Уборка каждый день в номерах. На ресепшене мило улыбаются

reviews.title: Bom hotel
reviews.text:
Localização do hotel é ótima.
Não gostei das toalhas e travesseiro. Mas é um bom hotel pelo valor que pagamos na promoção.
